titleStmt.title: SII 37.274: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 274. (A.R. No. B 380 of 1940-41.) Chinnaventurla, Jammalamaḍugu Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab lying in the courtyard of the Kēśava temple.
This is dated Śaka 1612, Pramōdūta, Māgha śu. 15, Monday, coresponding to 1691 A.D. February 2.

It states that grants of lands by the Kāpus and the Karaṇas of Chinnavēṇuturla to Rāmaṇṇa, son of Bhaṭṭu Kēśavaya. The done was renovated the temple of Chennakēśavara Perumāḷ, originally consecrated by Paraśurāma and to the sculptors Tippayya, son of Raḷa Liṅgābattuḍu and Ayyaṇa, son of Lakkōju Buchchana.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīrāma .
svasti śrī jayādbhyudaya śāli
vāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1612 Agunēṭi pramō
dūta saṁvatsara māgha śuddha 15 mī sōmavāraṁ
śrīmadrājādhirāja mahārāja rājaparamēśva
ra śrī vīrapratāpa śrīrāmarāju rāmappayya vija
yanagaramaṁdu pṛthivi sāṁbrājyaṁbu śēyucuṁ
ḍagānu cinavēṇutu¨rla sthāvarastulu karaṇaṁ taṁmma
rāju komāruḍu sūrappakōṭa tiṁmāreḍḍi komāruḍu
yallāreḍi modalaina kāvukaruṇālu yī staḷamaṁdu pa
ruśarāmapratiṣṭha ceṁnnakēśvara perumāḷlaku jīnōddhāra
ṇa pratiṣṭha śēyiṁci yītadhātidhi puṁṇyakālamaṁdu Āgnā
parulaina ghaṭṭukēśavaya komāruḍu rāmaṁnaku paṁṭna
trōvanu gollapalle polimēranu cēnu 1 yī dēvuṇi
tī¨rcina rāḷaliṁgābattuni komāruḍu tippaya lakkō
ju buccana komāruḍu Ayyanagāriki vaḍḍirēlatōvatū
¨rpuna jaṁbi cēnu yī 1 yī maryādanu mīku mānyaṁ yiccinā
pedabimāni + raṁganaka mīputrapautrapāraṁparyaṁtraṁgā
nu sukhāna Anubhaviṁcēdi + cēṁnarāyani
ni śēyiṁcinavāru koṁḍāreḍi ko
māruḍu yellareḍi
vaḍḍirēlamallayakomāruḍu cinaguruvayanityaceṁnnakēśavulaku nityadaṁḍḍamulu .
Digital edition of SII 37.274 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
